name: Cefacetrile
indication: Cefacetrile is a broad-spectrum first generation cephalosporin antibiotic effective in Gram-positive and Gram-negative bacterial infections.
mechanismOfAction: In vitro tests demonstrate that the bactericidal action of cephalosporins results from inhibition of cell wall synthesis. By binding to specific penicillin-binding proteins (PBPs) located inside the bacterial cell wall, it inhibits the third and last stage of bacterial cell wall synthesis. Cell lysis is then mediated by bacterial cell wall autolytic enzymes such as autolysins.
pharmacodynamics: Cefacetrile is effective against many Gram-positive bacterial strains and somewhat less effective against Gram-negative species. It works by inhibition of bacterial cell wall synthesis. It attains high serum levels and is excreted quickly via the urine.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Cefacetrile.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Cefacetrile.

interactions.name: Warfarin
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Warfarin.

interactions.name: Dicoumarol
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Dicoumarol.

interactions.name: Phenindione
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenindione.

interactions.name: Phenprocoumon
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenprocoumon.

interactions.name: Acenocoumarol
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Acenocoumarol.

interactions.name: Ethyl biscoumacetate
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Ethyl biscoumacetate.

interactions.name: Fluindione
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Fluindione.

interactions.name: Clorindione
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Clorindione.

interactions.name: Diphenadione
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Diphenadione.

interactions.name: Tioclomarol
interactions.description: Cefacetrile may increase the anticoagulant activities of Tioclomarol.

interactions.name: Probenecid
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cefacetrile can be increased when it is combined with Probenecid.

interactions.name: Teriflunomide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cefacetrile can be increased when it is combined with Teriflunomide.
